name: Number 8
short_description: SciFi shooter with first-person and third-person views, as well as adventure and story elements. In the game's world, you will face many dangers. Armed creatures resembling humans, drones, robots, and security systems will all try to destroy you.
detailed_description:
An adventure of a girl who wakes up in a strange place. Not remembering who she is or where she is, trying to survive, she attempts to escape. Combat skills buried in her subconscious, a blaster, and a suit enhancing her physical abilities are her only allies. The staff's correspondence is her only clue to learn anything about herself and the place that has no windows.

   ‘Number 8’ is a science fiction shooter with first-person and third-person views, as well as adventure and story elements. In the game's world, you will face many dangers. Armed creatures resembling humans, drones, robots, and security systems will all try to destroy you. Return fire at vulnerable spots to save time and ammo. Explore the environment, find upgrades for your suit and weapons, and read staff correspondence.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
